title: botrychium dissectum f. elongatum
intro: Botrychium dissectum f. elongatum, commonly known as the Slender Lady Fern, is a rare and unusual fern species that is native to North America. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The therapeutic actions of Botrychium dissectum f. elongatum may include wound healing, immune system modulation, and anti-cancer activities, likely due to its bioactive constituents such as flavonoids, phenolic acids, and sesquiterpenes. Further research is needed to confirm the full range of benefits and actions of this plant.

side_effects: Botrychium dissectum f. elongatum can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, allergic reactions, and interactions with certain medications.
